name: design surfaces: the surfaces are tailored to need (a simple internal workload omits realtime and edge) and every concern is grounded
command:
cat > p.json <<'JEOF'
{"complete":true,"answers":{"workload":"x","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"regulated","compliance_regime":"hipaa","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"analytics","integration_scope":"public","data_cadence":"real-time"}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile p.json --out req.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("req.json","utf8"));const has=(p,c)=>(j.pillars[p]||[]).some(x=>x.concern===c);const src=(p,c)=>((j.pillars[p]||[]).find(x=>x.concern===c)||{}).source_id;const all=Object.values(j.pillars).flat();process.exit(j.needs_grounding.length===0&&all.every(c=>c.grounding==="grounded")?0:1)' && cat > ps.json <<'JEOF'
{"complete":true,"answers":{"workload":"y","criticality":"important","availability_tolerance":"hours","data_loss_tolerance":"hours","data_sensitivity":"internal","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"small","budget_posture":"cost-first","communication_style":"synchronous","consistency_need":"eventual"}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile ps.json --out req.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("req.json","utf8"));const has=(p,c)=>(j.pillars[p]||[]).some(x=>x.concern===c);const src=(p,c)=>((j.pillars[p]||[]).find(x=>x.concern===c)||{}).source_id;process.exit((!j.pillars.realtime||j.pillars.realtime.length===0)&&(!j.pillars.edge||j.pillars.edge.length===0)&&has("testing","unit_testing")?0:1)' && echo tailored-grounded 1>&2
